## TRM1.5. Vertical flight efficiency of the climb (PI#8) {#trm1.5.-vertical-flight-efficiency-of-the-climb-pi8 .Heading-2-TZ}

Compared to the overall RP4 average value (34.8 seconds per flight), average times flown level during climb are 21.4 seconds per flight lower in Sweden. Stockholm Arlanda Airport (ESSA) has an average time flown level of 13.4 seconds per flight during climb.
